response.justification: The candidate has strong experience in AI-driven solutions, cloud platforms, and relevant technologies. They have a proven track record of leading technical projects and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure.
strengths: 8+ years of experience in developing AI-driven solutions
Proficient in multiple programming languages including TypeScript and Python
Experience with major cloud platforms and AI system design
concerns: No direct mention of experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
Lack of specific examples related to LLM performance metrics and optimization
Location in Kenya, not directly mentioned in the job description
